missing-article:
Database-ka ma soo helin qoraalkii bogga oo laga rabay in oo soo helo, oo la dhoho  "$1" $2.

Waxaan oo kale waxaa sabab ugu ah soo raacida linkiga duqoobay ee duwanaan ama taariikh oo kula xiriirtay bog la tirtitay.
Hadii ee sidaas eheen, waxaa laga yaabaa in software-ka aad qalad ka heshay.
Fadlan u sheek [[Special:ListUsers/sysop|maamulaha]], kana digtooneesii URL-ka.

passwordremindertext:
Qof ( ka soo galay cinwaanka-IP-ka  $1) ayaa eraysir oo cusub u codsaday  {{SITENAME}}  ($4).
Eraysir oo ku meelgaar ah oo loogu talagalay isticmaalaha "$2" ayaa la abuuray waxaana loo diray "$3".
Hadii uu ahaa qofka rabay, waxaa la rabaa in aad hadda gudaha soo gashid isla markaas neh eraysir cusub dooratid.
Eraygaan sirta oo ku meelgaarka ah wuxuu dhici doonaa ilaa  {{PLURAL:$5|maalin|$5 maalmood}}.

Hadii u qofkale sameeyay codsigaan, ama aad soo xasuusatay eraysirkaagii,
oo aadan u baahnayn in aad bedeshid, iska ilow farriintaan siina wado eraysirkaagi hore.

passwordreset-emailtext-ip:
Qof (laga yaabo adi, ka socda ciwaanka ip-ka $1) ayaa codsaday dib u habeenta erayga sirta ee  {{SITENAME}} ($4). Isticmaalahaan soo socda {{PLURAL:$3|akoonka waa |akoonada waa}}
la xiriira ciwaankaan emailka:

$2

{{PLURAL:$3|Eraysirkaan kumeelgaarka ah|Erayadaan sirta ee kumeelgaarka ah}} ayaa ku dhici doona {{PLURAL:$5|hal maalin|$5 maalmood}}.
Waa inaad hadda soo gashaa oo aad doorataa erayga sirta. Haddii oo qof kale sameeyey codsigaan, ama hadii aad soo xasuusatay eraygaagi sirta ee hore, ee aadan u baahneen in aad badasho, fariintaan waa iska ilaawi kartaa siina wado eraysirkaagii hore.
passwordreset-emailtext-user:
Isticmaale $1 ee {{SITENAME}} ayaa codsaday dib u habeen eraygaaga sirta ah ee  {{SITENAME}}
($4). Isticmaalahaan soo socota {{PLURAL:$3|akoon|akoonada}} waxee la xiriiraan ciwaankaan emailka:

$2

{{PLURAL:$3|eraysirkaan kumeel gaarka ah|Eraysiryadaan kumeel gaarka ah}} waxay dhacaayaan {{PLURAL:$5|hal maalin|$5 maalmood}}.
Waa in aad soo gashaa oo eraysir cusub doorataa hadda. Hadii oo qof kale codsigaan sameeyay, ama hadii aad soo xasuusatay eraysirkaagii hore, oo aadan u baahneen in aad badashid, iska ilaaw fariintaan siina isticmaal eraysirkaagii hore.
passwordreset-success: Waxaad codsatay dib u dejin furaha sirta ah.
passwordreset-success-details-generic: Haddii xogta la gudbiyay ay sax tahay, iimayl dib u dejin furaha sirta ah ayaa la diri doonaa. Haddii aadan helin iimayl, waxaan kugula talineynaa inaad booqato [[mw:Special:MyLanguage/Help:Reset_password|bogga caawinta dib u dejinta furaha sirta ah]] ama aad mar kale isku daydo mar dambe. Waxaad kaliya codsan kartaa tiro xaddidan oo dib u dejin furaha sirta ah muddo gaaban gudaheed. Kaliya hal iimayl dib u dejin ayaa loo diri doonaa koonto sax ah hal {{PLURAL:$1|saacad|$1 saacadood}} si looga hortago xadgudub.
passwordreset-emailtext-require-email:
Haddii aadan adigu codsigan samayn oo aad rabto inaad ka hortagto emayllo aan la rabin, waxaad beddeli kartaa xulashooyinka emaylkaaga ee $1.

Waxaad sidoo kale ka dhigi kartaa mid khasab ah in la isticmaalo magaca isticmaale iyo cinwaanka emaylka si loo abuuro emayllada dib-u-dejinta sirta. Tani waxay yarayn kartaa dhacdooyinka noocan ah.

'''Digniin: Boggaan waa la difaacay si ee isticmaalada heesto maamulnimada kaliya wax uuga badalaan'''

uploaded-event-handler-on-svg: In SVG faylasha lama oggola dejinta sifooyinka maareeya dhacdooyinka $1="$2".
uploaded-href-attribute-svg: Qaybaha <a> waxa ay ku xirmi karaan oo keliya (href) data: (fayl ku dhex jira), http:// ama https://, ama bartilmaameedyo jajab ah (#, isla dukumeentiga). Qaybaha kale, sida <image>, waxa loo oggol yahay oo keliya data: iyo jajab. Isku day inaad sawirrada ku dhex darto markaad SVG-gaaga dhoofinayso. Waxaa la helay <$1 $2="$3">.
uploaded-href-unsafe-target-svg: Waxaa la helay href ku socda bartilmaameed URI data: aan ammaan ahayn <$1 $2="$3"> oo ku jira faylka SVG ee la soo geliyay.
uploaded-animate-svg: Waxaa la helay summad "animate" ah oo laga yaabo inay beddelayso href, iyadoo adeegsanaysa astaanta "from" <$1 $2="$3"> oo ku jirta faylka SVG ee la soo geliyay.
uploaded-setting-event-handler-svg: Dejinta astaamaha maamule-dhacdo waa la xannibay, waxaa la helay <$1 $2="$3"> oo ku jira faylka SVG ee la soo geliyay.
uploaded-setting-href-svg: Isticmaalka summadda "set" si loogu daro astaanta "href" qaybta waalidka waa la xannibay.
uploaded-wrong-setting-svg: Isticmaalka summadda "set" si loogu daro bartilmaameed fog/data/script astaamo kasta waa la xannibay. Waxaa la helay <set to="$1"> oo ku jira faylka SVG ee la soo geliyay.
uploaded-setting-handler-svg: SVG dejinaya astaanta "handler" oo leh remote/data/script waa la xannibay. Waxaa la helay $1="$2" oo ku jira faylka SVG ee la soo geliyay.
uploaded-remote-url-svg: SVG dejinaya astaan qaabayn kasta oo leh URL fog waa la xannibay. Waxaa la helay $1="$2" oo ku jira faylka SVG ee la soo geliyay.
uploaded-image-filter-svg: Waxaa la helay shaandheeye sawir leh URL: <$1 $2="$3"> oo ku jira faylka SVG ee la soo geliyay.

filename-thumb-name:
Tani waxay u muuqataa cinwaan thumbnail ah. Fadlan ha dib ugu soo gelin thumbnails isla wiki-ga.
Haddii kale, fadlan sax magaca faylka si uu u noqdo mid macno leh, oo aan lahayn prefix-ka thumbnail.
filename-bad-prefix: Magaca faylka aad soo gelinayso wuxuu ku bilaabmaa "$1", taas oo ah magac aan sharaxaad lahayn oo badanaa si otomaatig ah ay u bixiyaan kaamirooyinka dijitaalka ah. Fadlan dooro magac fayl oo si fiican u sharaxaya waxa ku jira.
upload-proto-error-text: Soo gelinta fog waxay u baahan tahay URLs ku bilaabma http:// ama ftp://.
upload-file-error-text:
Cilad gudaha ah ayaa dhacday markii la isku dayay in adeega lagu abuuro fayl ku meelgaar ah.
Fadlan la xiriir [[Special:ListUsers/sysop|maamulaha]].
upload-misc-error: Cilad soo gelin aan la garanayn
upload-misc-error-text:
Cilad aan la garanayn ayaa dhacday intii lagu jiray soo gelinta.
Fadlan hubi in URL-ku yahay mid sax ah oo la heli karo, ka dibna mar kale isku day.
Haddii dhibaatadu sii socoto, la xiriir [[Special:ListUsers/sysop|maamulaha]].

Sawir ahaan, sheeg waxyaabaha ugu muhiimsan ee lagu arko, munaasabadda, ama goobta.

upload-form-label-not-own-work-local-gen: Waxa kale oo aad isku dayi kartaa [[Special:Upload|bogga soo gelinta caadiga ah]].
upload-form-label-own-work-message-gener: Waxaan fahamsanahay inaan faylkan ku soo gelinayo kayd wadaag ah. Waxaan xaqiijinayaa inaan sidaas u samaynayo anigoo raacaya shuruudaha adeegga iyo siyaasadaha rukhsad siinta ee halkaas.
upload-form-label-not-own-work-message-g: Haddii aadan awoodin inaad faylkan ku soo geliso si waafaqsan siyaasadaha kaydka wadaagga ah, fadlan xidh sanduuqan oo isku day hab kale.
upload-form-label-not-own-work-local-gen: Waxa kale oo aad isku dayi kartaa isticmaalka [[Special:Upload|bogga soo gelinta ee {{SITENAME}}]], haddii faylkan lagu soo gelin karo halkaas iyadoo la raacayo siyaasadahooda.
backend-fail-backup: Kuma suurtagelin in nuqul kayd ah laga sameeyo faylka "$1".

backend-fail-sizes: Kuma suurtagelin in la helo cabbirrada faylasha si loo isbarbardhigo.
backend-fail-notsame: Fayl aan isku mid ahayn ayaa hore ugu jira "$1".
backend-fail-invalidpath: "$1" ma aha waddo kaydin oo sax ah.
backend-fail-delete: Kuma suurtagelin in la tirtiro faylka "$1".
backend-fail-describe: Kuma suurtagelin in la beddelo xogta metadata ee faylka "$1".
backend-fail-store: Kuma suurtagelin in faylka "$1" lagu kaydiyo "$2".
backend-fail-copy: Kuma suurtagelin in faylka "$1" lagu nuqulo "$2".
backend-fail-move: Kuma suurtagelin in faylka "$1" loo wareejiyo "$2".
backend-fail-opentemp: Kuma suurtagelin in la furo fayl ku meelgaar ah.
backend-fail-writetemp: Kuma suurtagelin in lagu qoro fayl ku meelgaar ah.
backend-fail-closetemp: Kuma suurtagelin in la xiro fayl ku meelgaar ah.
backend-fail-read: Kuma suurtagelin in la akhriyo faylka "$1".
backend-fail-create: Kuma suurtagelin in la qoro faylka "$1".
backend-fail-maxsize: Kuma suurtagelin in la qoro faylka "$1" sababtoo ah wuu ka weyn yahay {{PLURAL:$2|hal bayt|$2 bayt}}.
backend-fail-readonly: Bakhaarka kaydinta "$1" hadda waa mid akhris keliya ah. Sababta la bixiyay waa: $2
backend-fail-synced: Faylka "$1" waxa uu ku jiraa xaalad aan iswaafaqsanayn gudaha kaydinta gudaha ee dhammaadka dambe.
backend-fail-connect: Kuma suurtagelin in lagu xirmo dhammaadka dambe ee kaydinta "$1".
backend-fail-internal: Cilad aan la garanayn ayaa ka dhacday dhammaadka dambe ee kaydinta "$1".
backend-fail-contenttype: Lama ogaan karo nooca nuxurka faylka si loo kaydiyo "$1".
backend-fail-batchsize: Bakhaarka kaydinta ayaa la siiyay koox ka kooban $1 {{PLURAL:$1|hawlgal|hawlgallo}} faylal; xadka waa $2 {{PLURAL:$2|hawlgal|hawlgallo}}.
backend-fail-usable: Lama akhrin karo ama lama qori karo faylka "$1" sababtoo ah oggolaansho ku filan ma jiro ama galalka/konteynarrada waa maqan yihiin.
backend-fail-hash: Lama go'aamin karo hash-ka sirta ah ee faylka "$1".
lockmanager-notlocked: Lama furi karo "$1"; ma aha mid xiran.
lockmanager-fail-closelock: Lama xiri karo faylka qufulka ee "$1".
lockmanager-fail-deletelock: Lama tirtiri karo faylka qufulka ee "$1".
lockmanager-fail-openlock: Lama furi karo faylka qufulka ee "$1". Hubi in galka soo gelinta si sax ah loo habeeyay iyo in adeega webka uu leeyahay oggolaansho uu wax ugu qoro galkaas. Ka eeg https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/Manual:$wgUploadDirectory wixii macluumaad dheeraad ah.
lockmanager-fail-db-bucket: Lama xiriiri karo ku filan xog ururiyeyaasha qufulka ee ku jira kooxda $1.
lockmanager-fail-db-release: Lama sii deyn karo qufullada keydka xogta $1.
lockmanager-fail-svr-release: Lama sii deyn karo qufullada server-ka $1.
lockmanager-fail-conflict: Lama heli karo qufulka. Qof kale ayaa wax ka samaynaya faylkan.
zip-file-open-error: Khalad ayaa dhacay markii la furayay faylka si loo sameeyo hubinta ZIP.
zip-wrong-format: Faylka la cayimay ma aha fayl ZIP ah.
zip-bad:
Faylka waa ZIP dhaawacmay ama aan si sax ah loo akhrin karin.

zip-unsupported:
Faylka waa ZIP isticmaala astaamo ZIP ah oo aan MediaWiki taageerin.
Lama hubin karo si amni ah.

uploadstash-not-logged-in: Ma jiro isticmaale soo galay, faylalku waa inay lahaadaan milkiile isticmaale.
uploadstash-no-such-key: Furaha noocaas ah ($1) ma jiro, lama tirtiri karo.
invalid-chunk-offset: Booska qaybta ma aha mid sax ah.

img-auth-badtitle: Lama abuuri karo cinwaan sax ah oo ka imanaya "$1".
img-auth-isdir: Waxaad isku dayaysaa inaad gasho gal "$1". Kaliya gelitaanka faylasha ayaa la oggol yahay.

Shaqada img_auth.php waa in ay soo bandhigto faylasha wiki gaar ah.  
Wiki-kan waxaa loo habeeyay inuu yahay wiki furan.  
Si ammaan fiican loo helo, img_auth.php waa la damiyay.

Fadlan hubi in URL-ku sax yahay iyo in boggu shaqaynayo.

Boggu wuxuu qaatay waqti aad u dheer inuu ka jawaabo.  
Fadlan hubi in boggu shaqaynayo, sug wakhti yar kadibna isku day mar kale.  
Waxa kale oo aad isku dayi kartaa waqti aan mashquul ahayn.

Xusuusnow inaad hubiso xiriirro kale oo ku saabsan tusmada ka hor inta aanad tirtirin.

doubleredirectstext:
Boggani wuxuu taxayaa bogagga u sii toosiya bogag kale oo u sii toosin ah.
Saf kasta wuxuu ka kooban yahay xiriirro u sii toosinta koowaad iyo labaad, iyo sidoo kale bartilmaameedka u sii toosinta labaad, oo inta badan ah bogga “dhabta ah” ee ay tahay in u sii toosinta koowaad ay u tilmaanto.
<del>Kuwa la xariiqay</del> waa la xalliyay.
double-redirect-fixed-move:
[[$1]] waa la wareejiyay.
Si otomaatig ah ayaa loo cusboonaysiiyay, hadda waxay u sii toosisaa [[$2]].

brokenredirectstext: Sii toosinta soo socota waxay ku xirmaan bogag aan jirin:

wantedpages-summary: Liiska bogagga aan jirin ee leh xiriirrada ugu badan ee loo jeediyo, marka laga reebo bogagga kaliya ay u sii toosin ku xiran yihiin. Si aad u aragto liiska bogagga aan jirin ee ay u sii toosintu ku xiran tahay, eeg [[{{#special:BrokenRedirects}}|liiska u sii toosinta jaban]].

Faylasha soo socda way jiraan laakiin laguma darin bog kasta.

Faylasha soo socda way jiraan laakiin laguma darin  bog kasta. Sawirrada lagu kala saaray qaybaha waxaa loo tixgeliyaa inay weli la isticmaalayo xitaa haddii aan lagu darin bog kasta.

apisandbox-jsonly: JavaScript ayaa loo baahan yahay si loo isticmaalo API bacaadka.
apisandbox-intro: Isticmaal boggan si aad u tijaabiso API-ga adeegga webka ee MediaWiki. Eeg [https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/API:Main_page dukumentiyada API-ga] si aad u hesho faahfaahin dheeraad ah oo ku saabsan isticmaalka API-ga. Tusaale: [https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/API:Tutorial#A_simple_query raadso cinwaannada bogagga ee la midka ah eray gaar ah]. Dooro ficil si aad u aragto tusaalooyin dheeraad ah. Ogsoonow in inkastoo tani ay tahay meel tijaabo ah, ficillada aad ku samayso boggan ay wax ka beddeli karaan wiki-ga.
apisandbox-loading: Waxaa la soo rarayaa macluumaadka API module "$1"...
apisandbox-load-error: Qalad ayaa dhacay intii la soo rarayay macluumaadka API module "$1": $2
apisandbox-no-parameters: API module-kan ma laha wax parameters ah.
apisandbox-dynamic-error-exists: Halbeeg lagu magacaabo "$1" ayaa horey u jiray.
apisandbox-templated-parameter-reason: [[Special:ApiHelp/main#main/templatedparams|xuduudaha qaabaysan]] waxaa la bixiyaa iyadoo lagu salaynayo {{PLURAL:$1|qiimaha|qiimayaasha}} $2.
apisandbox-fetch-token: Si otomaatig ah u buuxi calaamadda
apisandbox-submit-invalid-fields-title: Qaar ka mid ah meelaha waa aan sax ahayn
apisandbox-submit-invalid-fields-message: Fadlan sax meelaha la calaamadeeyay kadibna isku day mar kale.
apisandbox-results-error: Qalad ayaa dhacay intii la soo rarayay jawaabta API query: $1.
apisandbox-results-login-suppressed: Codsigan waxaa loo habeeyay sidii isticmaale aan soo galin, maadaama uu ka gudbi karo amniga biraawsarka ee Same-Origin. Fiiro gaar ah: maamulka otomaatiga ah ee calaamadda ee API bacaadka si sax ah uma shaqeeyo codsiyada noocan ah, fadlan si gacanta ah u buuxi calaamadda.
apisandbox-request-post: Codsigan waa in lagu diraa habka HTTP POST.
apisandbox-request-post2: Sababo la xiriira cabbirka xogta la dirayo, codsigan waxaa lagu diray habka HTTP POST.
apisandbox-request-formdata: Codsigan waa in loo diraa sidii fayl la soo gelinayo (tusaale ahaan iyadoo la adeegsanayo multipart/form-data).
apisandbox-results-fixtoken: Sax calaamadda kadibna dib u dir
apisandbox-results-fixtoken-fail: Calaamadda ee "$1" lama soo heli karin.
apisandbox-alert-page: Meelaha ku yaal boggan ma aha kuwo sax ah.
apisandbox-alert-field: Qiimaha goobtan ma aha mid sax ah.
apisandbox-continue-help: {{int:apisandbox-continue}} wuxuu [https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/API:Query#Continuing_queries sii wadi doonaa] codsiga ugu dambeeyay; {{int:apisandbox-continue-clear}} wuxuu tirtiri doonaa xuduudaha la xiriira sii wadista.
apisandbox-param-limit: Geli <kbd>max</kbd> si aad u isticmaasho xadka ugu badan.
booksources-text: Hoos waxaa ku yaal liis xiriirro ah oo u gudba bogag kale oo iibiya buugaag cusub iyo kuwa la isticmaalay, isla markaana laga yaabo inay bixiyaan macluumaad dheeraad ah oo ku saabsan buugaagta aad raadinayso:

index-category-desc: Boggan wuxuu leeyahay __INDEX__ (isla markaana wuxuu ku jiraa meel magac loo oggol yahay calankan), sidaas darteed waxaa lagu daraa tusmada robotyada xitaa halka caadi ahaan aan lagu darin.

expensive-parserfunction-category-desc: Boggan wuxuu isticmaalayaa shaqooyin falanqayn qaali ah oo aad u badan (sida #ifexist). Eeg [https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/Manual:$wgExpensiveParserFunctionLimit Manual:$wgExpensiveParserFunctionLimit].

Gacaliye $WATCHINGUSERNAME,

$PAGEINTRO $NEWPAGE $PAGELOG

Soo koobida tifatiraha: $PAGESUMMARY $PAGEMINOREDIT

La xiriir tifatiraha:
mail: $PAGEEDITOR_EMAIL
wiki: $PAGEEDITOR_WIKI

Ma jiri doonto ogeysiisyo kale haddii ay dhacdo waxqabad dheeri ah ilaa aad booqato boggan inta aad gasho mooyee. Waxaad sidoo kale dib u soo celin kartaa calamadaha ogeysiiska dhammaan bogagga aad daawatay ee liiskaaga daawashada.

Saaxiibkaa {{SITENAME}} Nidaamka ogeysiiska

--
Si aa u badasho dejinta ogeysiiska emailka, booqo
{{canonicalurl:{{#special:Preferences}}}}

Si aa u badasho jadwalkaaga daawashada, booqo
{{canonicalurl:{{#special:EditWatchlist}}}}

$UNWATCHURL

Jawaab celin iyo caawimaad dheeri ah:
$HELPPAGE

Boggan hadda waa la ilaaliyay sababtoo ah waxaa lagu dhex daray {{PLURAL:$1|boggan soo socda oo leh|bogagga soo socda oo leh}} ilaalin isdaba joog ah  oo shaqaynaysa.

undeletepagetitle: '''Meeshaan waxa ay ka koobatahay raadka wixii laga tiray [[:$1|$1]]'''.
undeletepagetext:
Bogga soo socda {{PLURAL:$1|waa la tirtiray laakiin weli waa|$1 bog ayaa la tirtiray laakiin weli waa}} ku jira kaydka waxaana dib loo soo celin karaa.
Kaydka waxaa laga yaabaa in mararka qaar la nadiifiyo.
undelete-fieldset-title: Dib u soo celi dib u eegisyada
undeleteextrahelp: Si aad dib ugu soo celiso taariikhda buuxda ee bogga, ka tag dhammaan sanduuqyada calaamadda aan la dooran kadibna guji {{int:undeletebtn}}. Si aad u sameyso dib u soo celin la xushay, calaamadee sanduuqyada u dhigma dib u eegisyada aad rabto in dib loo soo celiyo, kadibna guji {{int:undeletebtn}}.
undeleterevisions: $1 {{PLURAL:$1|dib u eegis|dib u eegisyo}} la tirtiray
undeletehistory:
Haddii aad bogga dib u soo celiso, dhammaan dib u eegisyada waxaa lagu soo celin doonaa taariikhda.
Haddii bog cusub oo isla magacaas leh la abuuray tan iyo tirtiridda, dib u eegisyada la soo celiyay waxay ka soo muuqan doonaan taariikh hore.
undeleterevdel:
Dib u soo celin lama sameyn doono haddii ay keento in bogga ugu sarreeya ama dib u eegista faylka si qayb ahaan ah loo tirtiro.
Xaaladahaas, waa inaad ka saartaa calaamadda ama ka saartaa qarinta dib u eegista ugu dambeysa ee la tirtiray.
undeletehistorynoadmin:
Boggan waa la tirtiray.
Sababta tirtiridda waxaa lagu muujiyey soo koobidda hoose, iyadoo ay la socoto faahfaahinta isticmaaleyaashii wax ka beddelay boggan ka hor inta aan la tirtirin.
Qoraalka dib u eegisyadan la tirtiray kaliya waxaa heli kara maamulka.

Halkaan waa  liiska lagu muujiyo manuuca iyo mamnuuc ka qaadista.
Ciwaanka IP ga ee la mamnuucay so iskeedka ee aan la soo ban dhigin.
Eeg [[Special:BlockList|Mamnuucyada]] si aad u aragto liiska mamnuucyada ee hadda shaqaynaua.

Fadlan la xiriir bixiyaha adeegga internet-ka ama taageerada farsamo ee ururkaaga si aad ugu wargeliso dhibaatadan amni ee culus.

lockdbtext:
Qufulka xogta kaydka wuxuu joojinayaa awoodda dhammaan isticmaalayaasha inay wax ka beddelaan bogagga, beddelaan dejimahooda, wax ka beddelaan liiskooda la socodka, iyo hawlo kale oo u baahan in xogta kaydka wax laga beddelo.
Fadlan xaqiiji in tani ay tahay waxa aad damacsan tahay inaad sameyso, iyo inaad furayso xogta kaydka marka dayactirkaagu dhammaado.
unlockdbtext:

movepagetext: Isticmaalka foomka hoose wuxuu dib u magacaabi doonaa bogga, isagoo dhammaan taariikhdiisii u raraya magaca cusub. Cinwaankii hore wuxuu noqon doonaa bog loo sii gudbiyo cinwaanka cusub. Waxaad si otomaatig ah u cusboonaysiin kartaa tixraacyada tilmaamaya cinwaankii hore. Haddii aad doorato inaadan sidaas sameyn, hubi inaad iska eegto [[Special:DoubleRedirects|tixraacyada labalaabka ah]] ama [[Special:BrokenRedirects|tixraacyada jabsan]]. Adiga ayaa mas'uul ka ah inaad hubiso in xiriiriyeyaashu ay u socdaan meeshii loogu talagalay. Ogsoonaaw in bogga aan la rari doonin haddii uu jiro bog kale oo magaca cusub leh, ilaa uu yahay mid loo sii gudbiyo oo aan lahayn taariikh wax ka beddel hore. Tani waxay ka dhigan tahay inaad bogga dib ugu soo celin karto magaciisii hore haddii aad qalad sameyso, laakiin ma tirtiri kartid bog horay u jiray. Fiiro gaar ah: Tani waxay isbeddel weyn oo lama filaan ah ku noqon kartaa bog caan ah; fadlan iska hubi inaad fahamsan tahay cawaaqibka ka dhalan kara intaadan sii wadin.

exporttext:
Waxaad dhoofin kartaa qoraalka iyo taariikhda tafatirka ee bog gaar ah ama bogag badan oo lagu duubay XML.

Tan waxaa lagu soo gelin karaa wiki kale iyadoo la adeegsanayo MediaWiki iyada oo loo marayo [[Special:Import|bogga soo gelinta]].

Si aad u dhoofiso bogag, geli cinwaannada sanduuqa hoose, hal cinwaan halkii sadar, kadibna dooro inaad rabto nuqulka hadda iyo dhammaan nuqulladii hore oo ay la socdaan taariikhda bogga, ama kaliya nuqulka hadda oo leh xogta tafatirkii ugu dambeeyay.

Xaaladda dambe waxaad sidoo kale isticmaali kartaa xiriir, tusaale ahaan [[{{#Special:Export}}/{{MediaWiki:Mainpage}}]] bogga "[[{{MediaWiki:Mainpage}}]]".

Dhammaan soo dejinta ka timaadda wiki-yada kale waxaa lagu diiwaangeliyaa [[Special:Log/import|diiwaanka soo dejinta]].

Ku kaydi qalabkaaga kadibna halkan ku soo geli.

confirmemail_noemail: Kuma haysatid cinwaan E-boosto sax [[Special:Preferences|isticmaala dooqiisa]].
confirmemail_text:
{{SITENAME}} waxay u baahan tahay inaad xaqiijiso ciwaanka iimaylkaaga ka hor inta aadan isticmaalin adeegyada iimaylka.
Riix badhanka hoose si aad u dirto iimayl xaqiijin ah oo ku socda ciwaankaaga.
Iimaylka waxa ku jiri doona xiriir leh koodh;
fur xiriirka biraawsarkaaga si aad u xaqiijiso in ciwaanka iimaylkaagu sax yahay.
confirmemail_pending:
Koodh xaqiijin ah ayaa horey laguugu soo diray iimayl.
Haddii aad dhowaan abuurtay akoonkaaga, waxaa laga yaabaa inaad sugto dhowr daqiiqo inta uu ku soo gaarayo ka hor inta aadan codsan koodh cusub.
confirmemail_oncreate:
Koodh xaqiijin ah ayaa loo diray cinwaankaaga iimaylka.
Koodhkan looma baahna si aad u gasho, laakiin waa inaad bixisaa ka hor inta aan la hawlgelin waxyaabaha iimaylka ku saleysan ee wiki-ga.
confirmemail_sendfailed:
{{SITENAME}} ma diri karin iimaylkaaga xaqiijinta.
Fadlan hubi in cinwaanka iimaylka uusan lahayn xarfo aan sax ahayn.

Barnaamijka dirista iimaylka ayaa soo celiyay: $1
confirmemail_invalid:
Koodhka xaqiijinta waa khalad.
Koodhku waxa laga yaabaa inuu dhacay.
confirmemail_invalid_format:
Koodhka xaqiijinta waa khalad.
Hubi iimaylkaaga, waxaa laga yaabaa in xiriirka xaqiijinta uu si aan dhammeystirnayn ugu yimid barnaamijkaaga iimaylka.
confirmemail_needlogin: Fadlan $1 si aad u xaqiijiso ciwaanka iimaylkaaga.
confirmemail_success:
Ciwaanka iimaylkaaga waa la xaqiijiyay.
Hadda waxaad [[Special:UserLogin|soo gali kartaa]] oo aad ku raaxaysan kartaa wiki-ga.
confirmemail_loggedin: Ciwaanka iimaylkaaga hadda waa la xaqiijiyay.
confirmemail_body:
Qof, oo laga yaabo inaad adiga tahay, kana yimid IP-ga $1,
ayaa ka diiwaan geliyay akoon "$2" oo leh ciwaankan iimaylka ee {{SITENAME}}.

Si aad u xaqiijiso in akoonkan runtii adiga leeyahay oo aad u hawlgeliso
adeegyada iimaylka ee {{SITENAME}}, ka fur xiriirkan browser-kaaga:

$3

Haddii aadan *adigu* diiwaan gelin akoonkan, raac xiriirkan
si aad u joojiso xaqiijinta ciwaanka iimaylka:

$5

Koodhkan xaqiijinta waxa uu dhacayaa $4.

watchlistedit-normal-explain:
Ciwaanada ee liiskaada waardiyaha hoos ayaa lagu soo ban dhigay.
Si aad u tirtito Ciwaanka, Godka udhow calaameey, ee guji "{{int:Watchlistedit-normal-submit}}".
waxaad awoodaa [[Special:EditWatchlist/raw|Liiska wax ka bedel]].
watchlistedit-raw-title: Wax ka beddel liiska la socodka ee ceeriin

Cinwaannada ku jira liiskaaga la socodka ayaa hoos lagu muujiyey, waxaana wax laga beddeli karaa adigoo ku daraya ama ka saaraya liiska;
hal cinwaan safkiiba.
Markaad dhamayso, guji "{{int:Watchlistedit-raw-submit}}".
Waxaad sidoo kale [[Special:EditWatchlist|isticmaali kartaa tafatiraha caadiga ah]].
